content: Hi! I saw your listing for the 3-bedroom condo in Downtown Miami. Is it still available? I'm looking to move in by March.
What's the price range for 2-bedroom apartments in Brickell? My budget is around $500K. Can you send me some options?
I'd love to schedule a tour of the waterfront property you posted last week. Are weekends available for showings?
Do you have any pet-friendly rentals in the Coral Gables area? Looking for something under $3,000/month with at least 2 bedrooms.
We're relocating from New York and need a family home with good school districts. Budget is $750K-$1M. Can you help us find something in Coconut Grove?
I'm an investor looking at multi-family properties in Miami-Dade. What's the current cap rate for a 4-unit building? Do you have any off-market deals?
Just curious — what are the HOA fees for the Ocean Tower units? Also, is parking included?
Hey, I saw your open house event this Saturday. Can I bring my realtor along? Also, is the property FHA-approved?
I'm a first-time homebuyer. Do you work with any lenders that offer down payment assistance programs? Looking at properties around $350K.
I need to sell my current property before buying a new one. Do you offer any bridge loan programs or can you connect me with someone who does?
Can you tell me more about the new construction project in Edgewater? When is the expected completion date and what units are still available?
Looking for a luxury penthouse with ocean views. Budget is $2M+. Do you have anything exclusive that hasn't hit the market yet?
